economic_notes: Business enterprises include Houston Pellet Limited Partnership (10% ownership) and Kyah Development Limited Partnership (99.9% ownership). Houston Pellet Plant LP assets $24,927,319, revenue $33,092,488, net income $1,910,516. Kyah Development LP assets $7,301,017, revenue $26,313,590, net income $3,536,244. All loans to Kyahwood Forest Products Ltd. have been fully allowed for.
notes: Consolidated statements include Kyah Wiget Education Society and Kyah Food and Fuel (fully consolidated line-by-line). Two business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis: Houston Pellet LP (10%) and Kyah Development LP (99.9%). Moricetown Legacy Fund ($820,000) classified as non-financial asset as only the annual grant allocation can be withdrawn. Ottawa Trust Funds ($168,064) held by federal government under Indian Act. Replacement reserve ($145,710) required under CMHC agreements. Capital Projects shows a deficit of $1,292,112 in the surplus breakdown. Audit report dated June 7, 2021, over a year after fiscal year end. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + ESDC + FNESC + Province of BC + FNHA = 8069304+179078+495919+1124340+2096560+2066782-75920 (approx); used sum of clearly government sources.
